end end return(function(b,R,v,y,O,a,l,p,U,F,B,Z,P,Y,u,K,k,N,w,h,T,z,i,W,x,t,I)B,K,T,i,U,P,W,k,u,p,t,h,w,I,Z,Y,N,z,x,F=function(b,s)local R=F(s)local v=function(...)return t(b,{...},s,R)end return v
